div.head: 190. Editorial Note
div.p: Between January 30 and February 8, Saudi Arabian King Saud and other Saudi dignitaries visited Washington and held extensive discussions with President Eisenhower, Secretary Dulles, and other high-ranking United States officials. For documentation on the visit of King Saud, including information relating to the Baghdad Pact and other regional issues, see volume XIII, pages 413 ff.
